## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible behavior.

## RFC

RFC: <!-- RFC-0001 / RFC-0002 / ... OR N/A: explain why no RFC threshold is triggered -->

Use `RFC: N/A` only when the change does not affect language semantics, IR or stable artifacts, stdlib public surface, runtime capability contracts, developer-visible diagnostics, CLI/LSP/formatter behavior, or repository governance.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests or checks run locally are listed in the PR description.
- [ ] Documentation is updated, or the PR explains why no docs are needed.
- [ ] Breaking changes include a `BREAKING CHANGE:` section with impact scope and migration guidance.
